items.title: Vertex makes $10B deal for commercial endocrinology biotech Crinetics
items.description:

items.title: Novartis commits $1.1B upfront to take Myricx Bio and its next-gen ADC platform
items.description:
Novartis said Monday it will be spending $1.1 billion upfront to buy Myricx Bio, which has an antibody-drug conjugate payload platform that could offer an edge over current approaches.

items.title: After landmark deal, AstraZeneca goes to CSPC again in up to $1.7B pact
